channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Messi's Heroics Lead Argentina to Quarter-Final Victory Against Egypt
item.description: Argentina's Lionel Messi delivered a masterclass performance as his team fought back from two goals down to defeat Egypt 3-2 in a thrilling Round of 16 clash at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The match, hel...

item.title: EAC Court Promotes Kiswahili for Justice and Good Governance
item.description: The East African Court of Justice (EACJ) has highlighted the importance of Kiswahili as a key language for promoting justice and good governance across East Africa. The court's president emphasized th...

item.title: Argentina overcomes two-goal deficit to defeat Egypt in World Cup match
item.description: Argentina delivered a remarkable comeback in a thrilling World Cup clash against Egypt, recovering from a two-goal deficit to secure a 3-2 victory. Lionel Messi played a crucial role in the turnaround...

item.title: Senate pushes for comprehensive wage reforms amid P85 hike debates
item.description: Senator Risa Hontiveros welcomed the P85 daily minimum wage increase for Metro Manila workers but emphasized the need for systemic reforms to address workers' challenges and support businesses. She re...

item.title: Naomi Osaka remains determined to win Grand Slam despite Wimbledon exit
item.description: Naomi Osaka, the Japanese tennis star, expressed her confidence in winning a fifth Grand Slam title despite a recent Wimbledon quarter-final loss. The 28-year-old, who previously won four majors inclu...

item.title: AI and Fan Creativity Reshape Erling Haaland's World Cup Persona
item.description: The article explores how Erling Haaland, the Norwegian footballer, has become a cultural phenomenon amplified by AI-generated content and fan creativity during the 2026 World Cup. While viral videos l...

item.title: Olivier Rioux's Parents and Their Influence on His Basketball Career
item.description: Olivier Rioux, a towering Canadian basketball star known for his extraordinary height, has a family legacy rooted in sports. His parents, Jean-François Rioux and Anne Gariépy, are both former volleyba...

item.title: House Prosecutors Argue Sara Duterte's Remarks on Hiring Hitman to Kill Marcos Jr. Are Criminal and Impeachable
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte's 2024 statements alleging she hired a hitman to kill President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., First Lady Liza Araneta-Marcos, and former Speaker Martin Romualdez are being scrutini...

item.title: BKTC Suspends Employee Over Alleged Theft Probe at Badrinath Temple
item.description: The Shri Badrinath-Kedarnath Temple Committee (BKTC) has suspended an employee, Pramod Nautiyal, following a probe into alleged financial irregularities in the handling of devotees' donations at Badri...

item.title: Man arrested for fraud and assault after fake land deal
item.description: A 53-year-old man, Venu, was arrested by Puzhal Police for allegedly defrauding a trader, Sudhakar, of ₹15 lakh through a forged land deal. Sudhakar, who runs a traditional medicine shop in Surapet, h...

item.title: Texas Attorney General Faces Legal Scrutiny Over Voter Registration Discrepancies
item.description: The article details the legal challenges faced by Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, who has been accused of violating the very laws he enforces regarding voter registration. Paxton, who established a...

item.title: The Age's Weekly Superquiz Puzzle: Test Your Knowledge with Mini Crossword Challenge
item.description: The Age's Superquiz feature continues to engage readers with its weekly puzzle challenges, offering a blend of entertainment and mental stimulation. The latest edition, published on Wednesday, July 8,...

item.title: Victoria Mboko withdraws from National Bank Open due to knee injury, missing key tournaments
item.description: Canadian tennis player Victoria Mboko has withdrawn from the National Bank Open in Toronto due to a knee injury sustained during the HSBC Championships in London last month. The world No. 10 from Burl...

item.title: Critical Acclaim for Christopher Nolan’s Odyssey: A Historical Epic
item.description: Christopher Nolan's epic adaptation of Homer's 'Odyssey' has garnered overwhelmingly positive reviews following its world premiere in London. Critics describe the three-hour film as a monumental achie...

item.title: Egypt's World Cup 2026 Exit and Prize Money Breakdown
item.description: Egypt's football team faced a heartbreaking exit from the FIFA World Cup 2026 after losing to Argentina in a dramatic Round of 16 clash. Despite leading 2-0 in the second half, Argentina staged a rema...

item.title: CGT Implications for Low-Income Individuals Under New Tax Rules
item.description: The article addresses concerns about capital gains tax (CGT) implications for individuals with low taxable incomes, particularly focusing on a married couple where the wife's income is below $10,000. ...

item.title: Flash floods in Doda cause widespread infrastructure damage
item.description: Heavy rainfall triggered severe flash floods in the Doda district of Jammu and Kashmir, causing extensive damage to residential buildings, roads, and agricultural lands. The sudden deluge overwhelmed ...

item.title: Kwara: Three Abducted Worshippers Regain Freedom After 105 Days, Five Killed in Kidnapping
item.description: Three female worshippers kidnapped during a March 22 attack on an ECWA Church in Kwara State have been rescued after 105 days in captivity, marking the end of a traumatic ordeal. The women were freed ...

item.title: United Airlines Introduces Early Luggage Drop Program to Ease Travel Stress
item.description: United Airlines has expanded its 'Twilight Bag Drop' program, allowing passengers to check their luggage a day early to reduce stress during busy travel periods. The initiative, initially tested at Ch...

item.title: Violet Grohl Announces Expanded 2026 UK Tour Dates
item.description: Violet Grohl, the Los Angeles-based musician and daughter of Foo Fighters frontman Dave Grohl, has expanded her 2026 UK tour following the release of her debut solo album 'Be Sweet To Me' in May. The ...
